key.name: provider-instances
key.description: JSON-encoded array of ProviderInstance objects. Each element is a JSON string describing one configured provider (uuid, typeId, name, apiKey, enabled, rawResponse).

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to poll provider APIs for updated usage data.

key.name: refresh-trigger
key.description: Incrementing this value signals the extension to perform an immediate API refresh. Written by the preferences dialog.

key.name: tray-display-mode
key.description: Controls what is shown in the panel label. "highest" shows the single highest usage percentage across all enabled providers. "all" shows the primary metric for every enabled provider separated by a middle dot. "instance:<uuid>" shows the primary metric for a specific instance only.
